description: Perfect for the office goer, this backpack has all that space that you need to carry your laptop, essentials and lunch everyday. Made of durable fabric, it's easy to maintain and and comfortable to carry.Height: 18.5" Width: 12" Depth: 8" Capacity: 25 litres Made of polyester with a nylon lining for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a velcroed separator to hold the laptop and accessories One front zippered compartment with organizer pouches, a dog loop and an appliqued nike swoosh badge for style Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable, meshed and padded handles with an ergonomically designed and padded back for carrying ease, ventilation and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries Loops on handles to sling essentials like an umbrellay, shoes or to hang an MP3 player when on the move nike badge on left handle, with brand embossed on back for style Care Hand washClean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not dry clean or machine washDo not bleach Do not tumble dryDo not wringLine dry Do not iron
